song.title: R40 My savior my God
song.lyrics:
[v1] I am not skilled to understand What God has willed, what God has planned I only know at his right hand Stands one who is my Savior
[v2] I take him at His word and deed Christ died to save me: this I read And in my heart I find a need Of Him to be my Savior
[p] That He would leave His place on high And for sinful man to die You count it strange, so once did I Before I knew my Savior
[c] My Savior Loves, my Savior Lives My Savior's always there for me My God; He was, my God; He is My God; is always gonna be
[v3] Yes, living, dying: let me bring My Strength, my solace from this spring That He who lives to be my King Once died to be my Savior
